title: Moderation queue resolved
body: The current abuse queue has been reviewed and resolved. We removed two high-severity cases: one account for cross-channel spam/phishing and one for targeted harassment of newcomers. We also issued warnings for repetitive automated-looking help-channel replies and a low-severity off-topic formatting issue. Reports involving trusted roles were reviewed and closed without sanctions where they were determined to be dispute/brigading-driven or otherwise non-actionable. Reminder: phishing, harassment, and spam will draw fast action; good-faith disagreements should go through normal moderation channels.
